recent_excerpts: Black Hills InfoSec's 2025 pentest analysis of 15 months of data shows the same top 10 vulnerabilities as 2022 — weak passwords, unpatched RDP, and misconfigured MFA remain…
Black Hills Information Security's SOC replaced tiered ticket queues with a flat team model where analysts solve incidents in real time.
Black Hills InfoSec published a practical guide to malware analysis covering static, dynamic, and memory analysis techniques for defenders seeking to reverse-engineer samples.
